text: Last class you sent a thank-you message and said you were grateful.
Today you run the whole deal with Robert, from the offer to the follow-up.
Offer
Negotiate
Explain
Reason
Agreement
Contract
Grateful
I would like to offer you a good price.
Let me explain. The reason is the new engine.
We have a deal. Please sign here.
Thank you. I am grateful for the deal.
Good morning, Robert. I would like to offer you a good price for the aircraft.
Thank you. Why is this aircraft cheaper than the old one?
Let me explain. The reason is the new engine. It is faster and safer.
That is clear. I am satisfied. We have a deal.
Wonderful. Please sign the contract here. The payment and delivery are ready.
Done. It was a pleasure. Thank you, Karina.
Thank you, Robert. I am grateful for the deal. I will send a follow-up message.
It was a pleasure to do business with you.

Good morning. This month I closed a great deal with Robert. First, I made an offer for the new aircraft. I said it was cheaper and faster than the old one. Then Robert had many questions, and I answered them. I said, let me explain, and the reason is the new engine. After that, we closed the deal and signed the contract. We agreed on the payment and the delivery. At the end, I sent a thank-you message. I am very grateful for this deal. It was a pleasure to work with Robert.

Hello, this is Robert. Thank you for the whole deal. Your offer was very good, and the price was cheaper than the old model. You answered all my questions clearly, and that helped me a lot. We signed the contract, and I am satisfied with the terms. The payment and the delivery are ready. I got your thank-you message, and I am grateful too. It was a pleasure to do business with you, Karina. I hope we work together again soon. Talk to you next time.

First, Karina made an offer for the new aircraft. Then she said it was cheaper than the old one. Next, she answered Robert's questions and said let me explain. After that, they closed the deal and signed the contract. Finally, Karina sent a thank-you message and said she was grateful.
